heading: Agents
subtitleAlice: Runs daily at 4am UTC · Scan → Draft → Review → Publish
subtitleVictor: Runs daily at 4:15am UTC · Nigeria, West & South Africa · Scan → Draft → Review → Publish
subtitleCarolyne: Runs daily at 4:30am UTC · East Africa · Scan → Draft → Review → Publish
subtitleBen: Runs daily at 5am UTC · US market · Scan → Draft → Review → Publish
subtitleMaya: Runs daily at 5:15am UTC · Global marketing intelligence · Scan → Draft → Review → Publish
subtitleAutomation: Background jobs that keep AskBiz data fresh and indexes current
subtitleSecurity: Automated compliance checks · Weekly audit on Mondays at 6am
subtitleAgent: Runs daily at 6am UTC · Scout → Analyse → Write → Review
aliceDesc: Scans live news daily via Tavily, drafts 10 blog posts targeting AskBiz’s core value areas. Posts go live on the blog once you authorise them.
victorDesc: Tracks what actually works in Lagos, Accra, and Johannesburg — real Nigerian benchmarks, not California averages. Drafts 10 African marketing posts daily grounded in MAA research.
carolyneRole: Head of Strategic Partnerships, East Africa
carolyneDesc: Tracks regulatory shifts, mobile money trends, and SME growth signals across Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, and Rwanda — drafts 10 East Africa-focused posts daily ready for your review.
benRole: Head of Strategic Partnerships, Americas · Founder, RoG Consulting
benDesc: Tracks IRS rulings, Fed moves, Shopify & Amazon shifts, and Main Street signals across the US — drafts 10 US-focused posts daily ready for your review.
mayaDesc: Tracks Meta Ads CPMs, TikTok Shop shifts, email marketing benchmarks, and SEO signals globally — drafts 10 marketing-focused posts daily ready for your review.
aliceEmptyDesc: Hit “Run Alice Now” to have her scan today’s news and draft 10 blog posts ready for review.
victorEmptyDesc: Hit “Run Victor Now” to have him scan Nigerian and African marketing signals and draft 10 posts grounded in real MAA data.
carolyneEmptyDesc: Hit “Run Carolyne Now” to have her scan East African markets and draft 10 posts.
benEmptyDesc: Hit “Run Ben Now” to have him scan US market signals and draft 10 posts ready for review.
mayaEmptyDesc: Hit “Run Maya Now” to have her scan global marketing signals and draft 10 posts ready for review.
agentNoContent: No content yet — run the agent to generate your first batch.
xNoResults: No results yet. Run a search to generate posts.
xNoPending: No pending posts. Run a search to generate new ones.
xClearQueueConfirm: Clear all pending posts from queue?
automationDesc: Cron jobs that run automatically on schedule. You can also trigger them manually.
jobSourceSyncDesc: Refreshes all connected Shopify, Stripe, Xero, Amazon data.
jobDailyBriefDesc: Pre-generates AI morning briefs for all users + emails them.
jobTokenRefreshDesc: Pre-emptively refreshes tokens for all integrations before expiry.
jobStaleContentDesc: Deletes rejected + stale pending content older than 30 days.
jobSeoMonitorDesc: Checks Google Search Console for traffic drops + broken pages.
jobStockReplenishmentDesc: Analyses POS sales velocity, predicts stockouts, generates reorder suggestions for all users.
blogAutoPublishDesc: High-quality blog posts (score 80+) are auto-published by Alice Watson. Lower-scoring posts go to Pending Review. Google & Bing are pinged on every publish.
securityDesc: Automated monthly (1st of the month) · 9 check categories · Reports stored for compliance evidence
secNoReportsDesc: Run your first security & GDPR audit to generate a report.
